fact: ⭐ OR-7, also called Journey, became famous for dispersing from Oregon into California and proving wolves could return to old range.
⭐ OR-7 traveled more than a thousand miles during his famous dispersal journey.
⭐ OR-7 eventually found a mate and became part of a new wolf family in Oregon.
⭐ Yellowstone's 06 Female, also known as 832F, became famous for her hunting skill and leadership.
⭐ The 06 Female was a Lamar Canyon wolf and one of Yellowstone's most celebrated wild wolves.
⭐ Wolf 302 in Yellowstone became famous for his unusual social behavior and long-running story with several packs.
⭐ Wolf 926F was a daughter of the 06 Female and became a well-known Lamar Canyon pack member.
⭐ Wolf 21M of Yellowstone's Druid Peak Pack became famous for leadership and tolerance within his pack.
⭐ Wolf 42F was a leading female of Yellowstone's Druid Peak Pack and became part of one of the park's best-known wolf stories.
⭐ The Druid Peak Pack became one of Yellowstone's most famous wolf packs after reintroduction.
⭐ The Junction Butte Pack is one of Yellowstone's well-known modern wolf packs.
⭐ The Lamar Canyon Pack became famous partly because of the 06 Female and her descendants.
⭐ Lobo, the Wolf King of Currumpaw, was a famous wolf from Ernest Thompson Seton's writings.
⭐ Lobo's story helped inspire changing attitudes toward wildlife in North America.
⭐ Old Three Toes was a famously elusive wolf from the American West.
⭐ The Custer Wolf was a legendary livestock-killing wolf pursued in the early 20th century.
⭐ White Fang is a fictional wolfdog created by author Jack London.
⭐ Akela is the leader of the Seeonee wolf pack in Rudyard Kipling's The Jungle Book.
⭐ Raksha is the mother wolf who adopts Mowgli in The Jungle Book.
⭐ Balto was a real sled dog often described as a wolfdog, famous for the 1925 serum run to Nome.
⭐ Togo, another sled dog from the serum run, led the longest and most dangerous leg of the relay.
⭐ Wolf Link is the wolf form of Link in The Legend of Zelda: Twilight Princess.
⭐ Amaterasu in Ōkami is a sun goddess who appears as a white wolf.
⭐ Sif, the Great Grey Wolf, is a memorable boss and companion figure in Dark Souls.
⭐ Ghost is Jon Snow's white direwolf in Game of Thrones.
⭐ Nymeria is Arya Stark's direwolf in Game of Thrones.
⭐ Grey Wind is Robb Stark's direwolf in Game of Thrones.
⭐ Summer is Bran Stark's direwolf in Game of Thrones.
⭐ Lady is Sansa Stark's direwolf in Game of Thrones.
⭐ Shaggydog is Rickon Stark's direwolf in Game of Thrones.
⭐ Two Socks is the wolf befriended by John Dunbar in Dances with Wolves.
⭐ Never Cry Wolf helped popularize public interest in wolf biology and wilderness observation.
⭐ The Grey uses wolves as central antagonists, though real wolf behavior is much less monster-like.
⭐ The Big Bad Wolf is one of the most recognizable wolf characters in children's stories.
⭐ The Capitoline Wolf is a famous Roman symbol connected to Romulus and Remus.
⭐ Fenrir is one of the most famous wolves in Norse mythology.
⭐ A single well-documented wolf can influence public opinion about an entire species.
⭐ Many famous wolf stories are really stories about humans learning to respect wild nature.
⭐ Famous wild wolves often become ambassadors for conservation even though they never know they are famous.
⭐ Famous wolf packs can teach scientists about leadership, dispersal, pup survival, and territory changes.
⭐ Many famous wolf stories are really stories about humans learning to respect wild nature.
⭐ Real wolves are usually more cautious and family-focused than their dramatic fictional versions.
⭐ Real wolves are usually more cautious and family-focused than their dramatic fictional versions.
⭐ Fictional wolves often symbolize freedom, family, danger, mystery, loyalty, or wilderness.
